title: Plan id in new seat based pricing

posts.author: JSnarski (Jakub Snarski)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, we want to switch to the new pricing in the app, but we’ll have to keep the old one for those who have an active subscription under the old terms. My question is, what planID will be set in the new pricing? Can we set it ourselves like we did with the old one? And is there a way to check if the plan is valid if the user is on the free plan using the SDK/API?
